title="Delivery Information" image_size="24x24"]How can you evaluate content without design? No typography, no colors, no layout, no styles, all those things that convey the important signals that go beyond the mere textual, hierarchies of information, weight.[/woodmart_accordion_item][woodmart_accordion_item icon_type="image" image="9060" title="14 Day Money Back Guarantee" image_size="24x24"]To short sentences, to many headings, images too large for the proposed design, or too small, or they fit in but it looks iffy for reasons the folks in the meeting can’t quite tell right now, but they’re unhappy, somehow.[/woodmart_accordion_item][/woodmart_accordion][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row]
